name: GOLFZON Social - Brooklyn
about: GOLFZON Social - Brooklyn is an indoor golf entertainment venue that combines high-end golf simulation technology with a full-service sports bar and event spaces. The facility offers a social atmosphere where guests can play on over 240 virtually recreated golf courses using advanced indoor simulators. Operating on a per-bay, hourly pricing model, the venue allows groups of up to 6 people per bay and is open to players of all skill levels. It features amenities like expert golf instruction, leagues, tournaments, and private VIP rooms for events, making it suitable for casual play, practice, and group celebrations.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-service sports bar with elevated food and drinks
Flexible event spaces including VIP rooms
Expert golf instruction and coaching available
Family-friendly environment for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with local beers and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your own clubs, but rental sets are available for adults and kids, including limited lefty sets on a first-come, first-served basis.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; the venue offers a full-service bar and elevated bar food on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For the average golfer, it takes approximately 45 minutes to 1 hour to play a round of 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes players of all ages, with special events like junior golf camps available.
